title: Add tests for all 4 LLM providers (Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini)
description:
## Problem
All 4 LLM providers have zero unit tests:
- `OllamaProvider.CompleteAsync` — no tests
- `OpenAICompatibleProvider.CompleteAsync` — no tests
- `AnthropicProvider.CompleteAsync` — no tests
- `GeminiProvider.CompleteAsync` — no tests

These are the critical path for all LLM chat interpretation. Every provider has a `return null` on failure contract that is untested.

## Desired Outcome
Each provider has at minimum: success path test, auth-failure test, timeout test.

## Scope
- Create test files for each provider using `HttpMessageHandler` mocking
- Test: `IsAvailable==false` returns null, HTTP timeout returns null, HTTP 4xx/5xx returns null, HTTP 200 returns content, empty response returns null, cancellation propagates

## Dependencies
- TSK-0180 (Gemini header change) must complete before GeminiProvider tests
- TSK-0182 (error body logging) should complete before OpenAI/Anthropic tests

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `OllamaProviderTests.cs` — minimum 5 tests
- [ ] `OpenAICompatibleProviderTests.cs` — minimum 5 tests
- [ ] `AnthropicProviderTests.cs` — minimum 5 tests
- [ ] `GeminiProviderTests.cs` — minimum 5 tests
- [ ] All tests mock HTTP (no real network calls)
- [ ] All tests pass
